action_set_definitions.name: get_current_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including the current simulation day, hotel inventory levels, current market pricing, and cumulative revenue. Use this to determine the parameters for pricing decisions.

action_set_definitions.name: set_daily_price_and_advance
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the room rate for the current day, simulates customer bookings, updates the cumulative revenue, and advances the simulation to the start of the next day. Note: At the start of each new day, the 'remaining_inventory' is automatically replenished to match 'total_inventory'.

daily_price.description: The price per room night to set for the current day.

state_description.current_day: The current day index of the simulation (e.g., 1 to 30).
state_description.total_inventory: Total number of rooms available in the hotel.
state_description.remaining_inventory: Number of rooms currently available for booking.
state_description.current_price: The current set price per room night.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: Total revenue accumulated since the start of the simulation.
state_description.market_demand_factor: A multiplier representing current market interest (1.0 is baseline).
state_description.competitor_price: The average price offered by local competitors.
